name: Key Lime Pie I
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole graham cracker pie crust, 9 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a pie shell or use a graham cracker crust if preferred.
2. Beat the egg yolks on medium speed until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Heat the lime juice in a saucepan over medium heat until thoroughly heated.
4. Gradually stir about 1/4 of the hot lime juice into the yolks, then add the yolks to the remaining hot lime juice in the saucepan, stirring constantly.
5. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring continually. Remove from heat and allow to cool.
6. Add sweetened condensed milk to the mixture and stir until thickened. Spoon the filling into the crust.
7. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
8. Beat cream with an electric mixer at high speed until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, until stiff peaks form. Spoon whipped cream onto the pie.
9. Refrigerate before serving.
